op.ESTELLA.potential.1.event.description.text: Combo skill Distortion improved: Physical Susceptibility duration +3s.

op.ESTELLA.potential.2.event.description.text: Ultimate Tremolo improved: Ultimate Energy cost -{1-costValue:0%}.

op.ESTELLA.potential.3.event.description.text: Battle skill Onomatopoeia improved: Freezing sound wave range +50% and DMG Dealt +40% to the first enemy hit.

op.ESTELLA.potential.5.event.description.text: After applying Solidification to an enemy, Estella gains 5 Ultimate Energy. Effect can only trigger once every 1s.

op.ESTELLA.skill.AUDIO_NOISE_BATK.event..text: An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Physical DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals {poise:0} Stagger.

op.ESTELLA.skill.AUDIO_NOISE_DIVE.event..text: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies.

op.ESTELLA.skill.AUDIO_NOISE_FINISHER.ev.text: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher that deals massive Physical DMG and recovers some SP.

op.ESTELLA.skill.DISTORTION.event.descri.text: When an enemy suffers Solidification. Quickly moves to the enemy's side to deal Physical DMG and forcibly Lift enemies in a small area. If the skill hits a target with Solidification, the skill deals additional DMG and applies Physical Susceptibility.

op.ESTELLA.skill.ONOMATOPOEIA.event.desc.text: A lance thrust that fires a stream of freezing sound waves that deal Cryo DMG and apply Cryo Infliction to all enemies along its straight path.

op.ESTELLA.skill.TREMOLO.event.descripti.text: Estella expends all her strength to unleash a powerful slam of the spear shaft, dealing Physical DMG to all enemies in a circular area around self. To enemies with Physical Susceptibility, the skill forcibly applies Lift to them.

op.ESTELLA.talent.COMMISERATION_T1.event.text: When triggering Shatter, the next battle skill Onomatopoeia cast returns 7.5 SP. This effect cannot stack.

op.ESTELLA.talent.LAZINESS_PAYS_OFF_NOW_.text: Ignores Cryo Infliction and takes -10% (T1) / -20% (T2) Cryo DMG.
